arguments.argument: I strongly argue that the core value of Wisdom/Learning dictates that we prioritize the long-term benefits of our users over short-term gains. While the high level of simulated attraction may lead to initial confidence boosts, it also creates a dependency on the virtual environment, hindering users from translating their skills to real-world dating situations. This could lead to a vicious cycle of isolation and decreased self-efficacy.
